sentences.translation: Grad je uveo novu autobusku liniju.
sentences.translationEn: The city launched a new bus line.

sentences.arabic: يَرْبِطُ الْخَطُّ الْجَدِيدُ الْأَحْيَاءَ الْبَعِيدَةَ بِالْمَرْكَزِ.
sentences.translation: Nova linija povezuje udaljene kvartove s centrom.
sentences.translationEn: The new line connects distant neighborhoods to the center.

sentences.arabic: تَتَوَقَّفُ الْحَافِلَةُ عِنْدَ عَشَرَةِ مَحَطَّاتٍ فِي الطَّرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Autobus staje na deset stanica na putu.
sentences.translationEn: The bus stops at ten stations along the way.

sentences.arabic: سَعِدَ السُّكَّانُ بِهَذَا الْخَطِّ الْجَدِيدِ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Stanovnici su se jako obradovali ovoj novoj liniji.
sentences.translationEn: The residents were very pleased with this new line.
